description: A minibar attendant needs to restock the minibars on a floor.

nodes.task_description: The attendant gets a report of all minibar consumption from the previous day.

expected_outcome.expected: A report is generated showing which items were consumed from which rooms.

nodes.task_description: The attendant stocks their cart with the necessary items from the storeroom.

expected_outcome.expected: The cart is stocked with the correct inventory.

nodes.task_description: The attendant visits each room, restocks the consumed items, and logs the restock in their handheld device.

expected_outcome.expected: All minibars are restocked, and the inventory system is updated.
